untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Detection of bearish divergence pattern (three rising price peaks with three declining momentum peaks) — pattern recognition beyond allowed indicators; (2) 'FastK' stochastic variant not in allowed list (only stoch_k, stoch_k_5 available); (3) Conditional momentum thresholds (60/40 based on +10/-10 parameter) requiring dynamic parameterization; (4) 'momentum' indicator not in allowed list — unclear if this refers to ROC, MACD, or another oscillator.
translation_notes: Partially translatable: Exit condition using stoch_d <= 50 is valid.
